base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of prologue_scroll_en — a ui (cutscene) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. 'PROLOGUE STEP INTO THE SHADOWS OF THE HELL HOUSE. YOU'VE ARRIVED BACK HERE AT TRANSYLVANIA ON BUSINESS: TO DESTROY FOREVER THE CURSE OF THE EVIL COUNT DRACULA.' — English intro-text scroll. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
